final:
module barrel_shifter(
    input [31:0] data_inverted,
    input [4:0] shift_amt,
    input dir,
    output reg [31:0] data_out
    );

    always @(*) begin
        if (dir == 1'b0) begin
            data_out = data_inverted << shift_amt;
        end else begin
            data_out = data_inverted >> shift_amt;
        end
    end
endmodule
